whyItMatters: BUILD KARPATHY'S SECOND BRAIN WITH CLAUDE FABLE 5 + OBSIDIAN Andrej Karpathy (openai co-founder) shared an architecture that turns Claude into a persistent second brain instead of a basic chat window how it works: > you point Claude Code at an Obsidian vault folder > you drop articles, PDFs, or video transcripts into raw folders > Claude reads the files, up…
